task: Write a Python function to extract the AWS account ID from an IAM ARN string
solution_criteria: Must parse ARN format (arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/RoleName) and return the 12-digit account ID, handle invalid ARNs gracefully

task: Create a JSON policy document that allows an IAM user to read objects from a specific AWS S3 bucket
solution_criteria: Must include Version, Statement with Effect Allow, Action s3:GetObject, Resource ARN with bucket name, and proper JSON structure

task: Write a regex pattern that matches valid AWS CloudWatch Log Group names
solution_criteria: Must match names containing alphanumeric characters, underscores, hyphens, forward slashes, periods, and hash symbols, with length 1-512 characters
